extraction.ocr_text:
Invoice Summary - Last 30 Days

I've analyzed 93 approved invoices from the payment queue. Here's the breakdown by currency:

Total by Currency:

Currency                    Total Amount                    Number of Invoices

USD                         127,479.71                      16 invoices
SGD                         121,088.43                      13 invoices
AUD                         53,490.50                       6 invoices
RON                         93,522.34                       8 invoices
NZD                         73,881.97                       7 invoices
EUR                         11,126.50                       6 invoices

Grand Total (in original currencies):

• USD: 127,479.71
• SGD: 121,088.43
• AUD: 53,490.50
• RON: 93,522.34
• NZD: 73,881.97
• EUR: 11,126.50

Key Statistics:

• Total Invoices: 93
extraction.description: This screenshot shows a generated invoice summary report in a conversational/chat-style interface, likely the output of a UiPath conversational agent or debug chat response rather than a configuration screen. The page summarizes approved invoices from the last 30 days, with a table listing totals by currency and number of invoices, followed by grand totals and key statistics. No editable fields or configuration panels are visible; it is a read-only results view.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows the agent's summarized output for invoice data, including a currency breakdown table, grand totals in original currencies, and key statistics such as the total number of invoices.
